calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Aug-30-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Mitchell Port, via Zoom, for and with Elizabeth Belser, Personal Representative.

The court points to the unapproved distribution made by the Personal Representative. Counsel reports that as sole heir, his client unknowingly made the distribution for maximum investment. Counsel reports that all creditors and debts related to the estate have been paid. The court reminds counsel that the distribution is not appropriate. Counsel advises that he typically discusses the matter of court rules regarding unauthorized distributions with his clients but doesn't recall having the conversation with Ms. Belser. The court and counsel discuss the statutory fee basis which included gains, of which no details were submitted to the court. Counsel offers advocacy regarding the request for statutory fees.

The matter is submitted.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Choi. Not Reported.
